name_en: YSL Saint Laurent Shopping Bag. Truly have to admire how beautiful it really is. Chic girl/street style/ fashionista essential. New design with new fabric in a new matte deer skin texture. The feel and texture are super great. The stitching on this bag is neat and aligned, very classy. The capacity is sufficient and it has a zipper pocket inside! Whether matching with various outfits or attending various occasions, it's all ok. Come get one! Size 25-21-10
